title: ヘイカノジョ、遊びましょ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while stopping by the shopping center...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, Tazuna, what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Um, well, I appreciate the invitation...
choice_data_list: What are you two up to?
What are you two up to?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Good timing!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Good timing!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Can you please help me entice Tazuna?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We ran into each other just as she was
finishing an errand for the director.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So I thought we could hang out together and
chillax! But she isn't playing along...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The director is waiting for me. I have to go back
soon.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're always so serious! Let your hair down every
once in a while!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Maruzensky and Tazuna get along quite
well, despite their relationship as student and
director's assistant.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You've been working nonstop lately. Everyone is
worried about you!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Even so...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, use that newfangled phone of yours to
call the director up real quick! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Just repeat after me, "I shall return posthaste
after enjoying a lemonade at a cafe with
Maruzensky!" ☆

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
A lemonade at a cafe... does sound rather
wonderful...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, don't you think she should have a
little fun?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, don't you think she should have a
little fun?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky comes on strong, but her heart is in
the right place. However, I also know that Tazuna
is very serious about her work...
choice_data_list:
We could take a leisurely stroll back to the
academy.
I think it's okay to have a little fun sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's an interesting idea. Any particular
reason?
choice_data_list:
A friendly chat can be pretty refreshing, don't
you think?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's true... Chatting with friends can put some
pep in your step.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Well said, Trainer! Let's make our way back, then.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you say that like your bacon just got saved!
Rude...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I know you're just worried about me,
Maruzen. And I do appreciate the concern.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Eh, it's no biggie. Anyway, enough of the boring
chitchat...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Wait until you hear this juicy secret about
Tazuna! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Wait until you hear this juicy secret about
Tazuna! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: What?! What are you talking about?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The other day, I went to her room unannounced,
and when I opened that creaky closet of hers—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: MARUZENSKY!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, only joshing ya! Let's head back! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We don't end up discussing any secrets, but I get
a glimpse of just how close the two of them are as
we walk home.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: See! It's agreed!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: See! It's agreed!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Why resist the inevitable? Have some fun with
me!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, very well. Only for ten minutes, okay?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! You're mine now, Tazuna! ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Of course, your attendance will also be required,
Trainer!
choice_data_list: I had a feeling you'd say that.
I had a feeling you'd say that.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Of course, your attendance will also be required,
Trainer!
choice_data_list: I had a feeling you'd say that.
I had a feeling you'd say that.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you saw that coming, did you? You know me
too well! ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you saw that coming, did you? You know me
too well! ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's start with a little shopping! And
away we gooo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hey! Wait for us!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe... As spirited as ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of us end up walking around the mall.
Although it's a little exhausting, it's also a nice
break.
